title: Dressrosa Is Cut Off
description: Pages 6–10 focus on dressrosa is cut off, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Colosseum Announcer, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as doflamingo announces the rules of his Birdcage game, putting prices on the heads of Luffy, Law, Riku, and the allies who threaten him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: think care- fully... Will you come and try to take my head?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: or will you lend your aid to my donquixote family...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: ...and bring the twelve fools who oppose me to justice?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Make the wrong choice, and this game will never end!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: For each star, I will pay one hundred million bell!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: These are the convicts I ask you to seek!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Ahhhhh!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Straw hat pirates "pirate Hunter" zero

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Straw hat pirates cyberg

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Samurai of the Wano Country "Foxfire" Kinkemon

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Straw hat pirates "Devil child"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Former King of DressRosa Riku Doldo III

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Captain of the Heart Pirates Royal,Shichibukai (Tentative) "Surgeon of Death" TraFAlgar Law

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Captain of the strawhat pirates "Strawhat"" Luffy

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Chief of Staff of the Revolution: Today Army, SABO

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: C...Captain kyros!! I'd forgotten about him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The Invinct- BLE GLADIA- TOR!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: There are pirates up there, too!! It's the straw hats!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: violet, officer of the family....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: She was really princess Viola...?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Fuffuffus Fuffu!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The main leaders of each organ- isation...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: ...are all worth three stars each!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Three hundred million!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Law and straw hat Luffy!! It's that duo who's been the talk of the papers...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: The new "pirate Alliance"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: .....KING RIKU...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: ...!!! his majesty is still alive....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: There's a big shot from the revolutionaries, too!!! Their Chief of Staff!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: It seems word has travelled quickly...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Even ME?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: ...th...thank goodness... they haven't noticed me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: And finally... there is one man who has angered me today more than any other....!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: He is the very reason why you are all forced to take part in this twisted game!! To the lucky individual who brings me this man's head....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: I will pay five hundred million Bell!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Straw hat: Pirates "God" usopp?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Whoa- AA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Five hundred million!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Strawiha Pirates »God» usopp

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Yeah- huhh- huh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: That's enough to live out a whole life of pleasure!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: th... this is quite terrible..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: "uso- Land is in trouble!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: The five-star Target!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: I'm seeing two one- stars and a three-star as well!!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Sabo- Sun, what now?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: We're going above-ground. All of us. Hurry!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Sorry about this, God usopp!! Die for us, will ya?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: th...those traitors...!! They were worshiping me just a minute ago!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Dammit- All! Let's get outta here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Roger that!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: There's one of YEM over there, too!! The one-star samurai!! That's a hundred million bell!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: ...A...accord- ing to the dwarfs, this is the scrap- yard...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Are you really here, Kan- Juiro?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Here goes no- thing!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: He fell down!! The Samural fell into the hole!!!

summary: Dressrosa Is Cut Off develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Colosseum Announcer, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
